title: 2. It is also very effective to select TongShen 通肾 (88.09), TongWei 通胃 (88.10) a
text:
针通肾、通胃、通背亦特效。
It is also very effective to needle BiGuan (ST 31) of the stomach meridian to treat pain of the shoulder and back.
In addition to the above-mentioned Tung's extraordinary points, ShenGuan is also a frequently used effective
point.
